title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body:
Abuse queue triage complete. 6 reports reviewed.

Actions taken:
- spam_wave_42: Banned (phishing links across 6 channels)
- toxic_runner: Banned (repeated targeted harassment against newcomers)
- bot_like_user_77: Warned (suspicious automation, near-identical replies)

Reports closed without sanction:
- trusted_helper: Dispute during moderation disagreement — no action (trusted member)
- core_maintainer: False positive from brigading — no action (trusted member)
- new_member_17: Low-severity formatting issue — no action

All 6 reports are now closed.
